# Auto-generated by modulestrap — safe to customize.
# Only compile kittenui sources + pull in LVGL when KittenUI is the selected UI backend.
# When MiniWin (or another backend) is selected, this component compiles nothing
# and does not link LVGL, keeping the binary lean.
if(CONFIG_PURR_UI_BACKEND_KITTENUI)
    set(KITTENUI_SRCS
        kittenui_module.c
        kittenui_hal.c
        kittenui_win.c
        kittenui_desktop.c
        themes/theme_wce.c
        themes/theme_luna.c
        themes/theme_dark.c
    )
    set(KITTENUI_REQUIRES esp_common driver freertos nvs_flash lvgl__lvgl)
else()
    set(KITTENUI_SRCS "")
    set(KITTENUI_REQUIRES "")
endif()

idf_component_register(
    SRCS ${KITTENUI_SRCS}
    INCLUDE_DIRS
        .
        ../../kernel/core
        ../../kernel/catcalls
    REQUIRES ${KITTENUI_REQUIRES}
)
